Metadata.title: Zhongjia Huaqiang Biotech (Chongqing) Co., Ltd.
Metadata.description: A concise corporate website for Zhongjia Huaqiang in Qijiang, Chongqing, covering green chemicals, fertilizer products, industrial base information and cooperation.

footer.location: Panshi Village, Fuhuan Town, Qijiang District, Chongqing
footer.note: Zhongjia Huaqiang Biotech (Chongqing) Co., Ltd. · Green Chemicals and Fertilizer Products

hero.title: Zhongjia Huaqiang Biotech (Chongqing) Co., Ltd.
hero.lead: Based in Qijiang, Chongqing, the company develops an integrated industrial platform covering calcium ammonium nitrate, ammonium phosphate, calcium superphosphate, calcium sulfate materials and potassium fluorosilicate.

project.title: Rural Revitalization and Green Circular Economy Project
project.lead: The project connects Qijiang's circular-economy industrial base, nitric-acid-route phosphorus chemicals, resource utilization and agricultural services.
project.note: The page presents Qijiang location, chemical industry foundation and agricultural application scenarios.

products.title: Product Center
products.lead: The product center shows seven products: calcium ammonium nitrate, monoammonium phosphate, diammonium phosphate, granular calcium superphosphate, calcium sulfate whisker, nano calcium sulfate and potassium fluorosilicate.
products.note: Product indicators are presented around package labeling, standards, testing management and application scenarios.

items.name: Calcium Ammonium Nitrate
items.description: Agricultural calcium ammonium nitrate for soluble-fertilizer systems, facility agriculture and acidic soil improvement scenarios.

items.name: Monoammonium Phosphate
items.description: Industrial-grade monoammonium phosphate MAP for industrial, compound-fertilizer and related phosphate-chemical applications.

items.name: Diammonium Phosphate
items.description: Diammonium phosphate DAP provides an efficient phosphate source for grain crops, economic crops and regional agricultural input markets.

items.name: Granular Calcium Superphosphate
items.description: Granular calcium superphosphate supports basic fertilization and regional agricultural input demand.

items.name: Calcium Sulfate Whisker
items.description: Calcium sulfate whisker is a calcium-based material product for plastics, paper, building materials and related applications.

items.name: Nano Calcium Sulfate
items.description: Nano calcium sulfate supports fine-material applications such as plastics, fillers and modified materials.

items.name: Potassium Fluorosilicate
items.description: Potassium fluorosilicate K₂SiF₆ is a fluorine-resource utilization product for related industrial and agricultural supporting scenarios.

base.title: Industry and Base
base.lead: The base connects Qijiang's industrial support with fertilizers, industrial phosphate, calcium-based materials and potassium fluorosilicate.
points: Fertilizer products include calcium ammonium nitrate, diammonium phosphate and granular calcium superphosphate.
Industrial phosphate product includes monoammonium phosphate.
Calcium-based materials include calcium sulfate whisker and nano calcium sulfate.
Potassium fluorosilicate serves related industrial and agricultural supporting applications.

quality.title: Technology and Quality
quality.lead: Technology and quality cover product categories, process routes, intellectual property, quality control, safety and environmental management.

items.title: R&D and patents
items.description: The company extends technology accumulation from Xie Guangqiang-related enterprises in compound fertilizer, nitro-humic-acid fertilizer, production equipment and process improvement.

items.title: Quality inspection
items.description: Quality management covers raw-material inspection, process parameters, product packaging, release testing and customer traceability.

items.title: Safety and environment
items.description: Safety and environmental management covers chemical units, fire prevention, explosion protection, wastewater and exhaust treatment, solid-waste utilization and emergency response.

servicePath.title: Cooperation Path
servicePath.lead: Three common visitor needs are organized as clear action entries: product information, Qijiang base context and direct cooperation contact.

sections.title: Corporate positioning
sections.body: The company is located in Panshi Village, Fuhuan Town, Qijiang District, Chongqing, and develops a platform for green chemicals and fertilizer products.

sections.title: Product directions
sections.body: The product center presents seven products: calcium ammonium nitrate, monoammonium phosphate, diammonium phosphate, granular calcium superphosphate, calcium sulfate whisker, nano calcium sulfate and potassium fluorosilicate.

products.title: Product Center
products.lead: Product pages focus on seven product categories, package images, indicators and application directions.

gallery.title: Product Package Images
gallery.lead: The seven products below cover fertilizer products, industrial phosphate, calcium-based materials and fluorosilicate products.

sections.title: Seven Product Catalog
sections.body: The product center presents seven product categories covering agricultural fertilizers, industrial phosphate, calcium-based materials and fluorosilicate products.

sections.title: Fertilizers and Industrial Phosphate
sections.body: Calcium ammonium nitrate, diammonium phosphate and granular calcium superphosphate support agricultural fertilizer scenarios. Monoammonium phosphate supports industrial and related phosphate-chemical applications.
points: Calcium ammonium nitrate: total N ≥15.0%, water-soluble Ca ≥18.0%
Granular calcium superphosphate: available P ≥12.0%, water-soluble P ≥7.0%

sections.title: Calcium-based and Fluorosilicate Products
sections.body: Calcium sulfate whisker and nano calcium sulfate support calcium-based material applications. Potassium fluorosilicate supports related industrial and agricultural scenarios.
points: Calcium sulfate whisker: purity ≥98%, whiteness ≥98%, aspect ratio ≥30

sections.title: Product materials
sections.body: Product materials cover package specifications, standards, testing management, applicable industries, storage guidance and customer service.

industry.title: Industry and Base
industry.lead: This page presents Qijiang elements, industrial park support, industrial coordination and logistics conditions.

sections.title: Qijiang elements
sections.body: The base connects Chongqing location, Qijiang industrial conditions, industrial-park utilities and logistics links.

sections.title: Industrial coordination
sections.body: The base supports product manufacturing, raw-material coordination, quality testing, storage, logistics and customer service.

quality.title: Technology and Quality
quality.lead: This page presents R&D accumulation, intellectual property, quality inspection, safety, environmental responsibility and resource utilization.

sections.title: Technology route
sections.body: The technology route covers nitric-acid-route phosphorus chemicals, nitrogen-phosphorus-calcium coordination, humic-acid compound fertilizers, calcium-based materials and fluorosilicate products.

sections.title: Public patent results
sections.body: Xie Guangqiang-related enterprises have accumulated technologies in fertilizer formulas, production methods, equipment and process control. Public patent information shows that patents related to Chongqing Huaqiang Ecological Fertilizer Co., Ltd. cover nitro-humic-acid compound fertilizer, raw-material feeding, automatic packaging, finished-product treatment, hot-air pretreatment and exhaust-gas water circulation.
points: High-activity nitro-humic-acid compound fertilizer and preparation method
Nitro-humic-acid compound fertilizer and preparation method
Hot-air pretreatment device for drying compound-fertilizer granules

sections.title: Safety and environment
sections.body: Safety and environmental management covers chemical units, fire prevention, explosion protection, wastewater and exhaust treatment, solid-waste utilization and emergency response.

news.title: News and Resources
news.lead: This section is used for corporate news, project updates, product manuals and public resources.

sections.title: Company updates
sections.body: The section publishes company news, product resources, technology and quality information, project progress and cooperation materials.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.lead: Government bodies, customers, distributors, suppliers, engineering service providers and project partners are welcome to contact Zhongjia Huaqiang.

sections.title: Company address
sections.body: Panshi Village, Fuhuan Town, Qijiang District, Chongqing

sections.title: Cooperation directions
sections.body: Inquiries may cover fertilizer products, industrial materials, calcium-based materials, potash and new-energy material directions, product documents, project cooperation and site visits.
